item.name: 🔗 Webhooks — Bolna
item.description: Simulate Bolna webhook events for testing. Use a real bolnaCallId from an actual call record in DB.

body.raw:
{
  "call_id": "{{BOLNA_CALL_ID}}",
  "agent_id": "{{BOLNA_ID}}",
  "status": "completed",
  "duration": 187,
  "recording_url": "https://storage.bolna.dev/recordings/test-001.mp3",
  "summary": "The lead is qualified and interested. Budget matches at ₹1.5 Cr. Looking for 3 BHK for personal use. Timeline is 6 months. HOT lead — follow up immediately.",
  "transcript": "Agent: Hi, this is Arjun calling from Godrej. Am I speaking with Rahul?\nUser: Yes, speaking.\nAgent: I'm calling about Godrej Bannerghatta. Do you have a moment?\nUser: Yes, I was actually looking at properties in that area.\nAgent: Great! What configuration are you looking for?\nUser: 3 BHK preferably.\nAgent: And what is your budget range?\nUser: Around 1.5 crore.\nAgent: Perfect, that fits well. Are you looking for personal use or investment?\nUser: Personal use, planning to move in within 6 months.",
